{{Quote|<s></s>''Bast Castle''…This is Imperial shuttle ''Tridius''. You are ordered to make ready to receive your ''Emperor''!|The ''Tridius'' approaches Bast Castle|<ref name="Hand of Darkness" />}}
The '''''Tridius''''' was a [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttle]]<ref name="Tridius" /> that was the personal [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] of the [[Cloning/Legends|Reborn]] [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]].<ref name="Hand of Darkness" /> It was distinguished a [[Color/Legends|gray]] stripe that ran from the nose of its [[Cockpit/Legends|cockpit]] to its stern.<ref name="Tridius" /> In the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]], the ''Tridius'' ferried the [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] and [[Dark Side Elite]]s [[Xecr Nist]] and [[Tedryn-Sha]] to [[Bast Castle]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Vjun/Legends|Vjun]].<ref name="Hand of Darkness" />

{{Ship-stub}}
